query:
SELECT o.id, o.status, o.createdAt, o.acceptedAt, o.deliveredAt, o.deliveryDuration, c.phone
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customerId = c.id
WHERE c.phone = '07878886827'
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Kz4ErUoqpGjgNg.dff2f62e1b6f --database nuXmcfyGeo7bacZX3ZUfKS --execute SELECT o.id, o.status, o.createdAt, o.acceptedAt, o.deliveredAt, o.deliveryDuration, c.phone
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customerId = c.id

LIMIT 1;
